001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.app.Dialog;
004import android.os.Bundle;
005import android.view.LayoutInflater;
006import android.view.View;
007import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
008import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
009import androidx.fragment.app.DialogFragment;
010import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
011import com.google.android.material.dialog.MaterialAlertDialogBuilder;
012import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.DialogAddIncubatorBinding;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.IncubatorViewModel;
017import java.util.List;
018import java.util.Locale;
019
020@AndroidEntryPoint
021public class AddIncubatorDialogFragment extends DialogFragment {
022
023  static final String INCUBATOR_ID_KEY = "incubator_id";
024
025  public static AddIncubatorDialogFragment newInstance(long incubatorId) {
026    AddIncubatorDialogFragment fragment = new AddIncubatorDialogFragment();
027    Bundle args = new Bundle();
028    args.putLong(INCUBATOR_ID_KEY, incubatorId);
029    fragment.setArguments(args);
030    return fragment;
031  }
032
033  @NonNull
034  @Override
035  public Dialog onCreateDialog(@Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
036    DialogAddIncubatorBinding binding = DialogAddIncubatorBinding.inflate(
037        LayoutInflater.from(requireContext()));
038
039    long incubatorId = getArguments() != null
040        ? getArguments().getLong(INCUBATOR_ID_KEY, 0) : 0;
041    boolean editing = incubatorId > 0;
042
043    if (editing) {
044      Incubator existing = findIncubatorById(incubatorId);
045      if (existing != null) {
046        binding.incubatorName.setText(existing.getName());
047        binding.incubatorModel.setText(existing.getModel());
048        if (existing.getTargetTemperature() != 0) {
049          binding.targetTemperature.setText(
050              String.format(Locale.getDefault(), "%.1f", existing.getTargetTemperature()));
051        }
052        if (existing.getTargetHumidity() != 0) {
053          binding.targetHumidity.setText(
054              String.format(Locale.getDefault(), "%.0f", existing.getTargetHumidity()));
055        }
056      }
057    }
058
059    MaterialAlertDialogBuilder builder = new MaterialAlertDialogBuilder(requireContext())
060        .setTitle(editing ? R.string.title_edit_incubator : R.string.title_add_incubator)
061        .setView(binding.getRoot())
062        .setNegativeButton(android.R.string.cancel, (dialog, which) -> {})
063        .setPositiveButton(R.string.action_save, (dialog, which) -> {
064          String name = getText(binding.incubatorName);
065          if (name.isEmpty()) {
066            return;
067          }
068          Incubator incubator = new Incubator();
069          if (editing) {
070            incubator.setId(incubatorId);
071          }
072          incubator.setName(name);
073          incubator.setModel(getText(binding.incubatorModel));
074          incubator.setActive(true);
075
076          String tempText = getText(binding.targetTemperature);
077          if (!tempText.isEmpty()) {
078            try {
079              incubator.setTargetTemperature(Double.parseDouble(tempText));
080            } catch (NumberFormatException ignored) {
081            }
082          }
083
084          String humidityText = getText(binding.targetHumidity);
085          if (!humidityText.isEmpty()) {
086            try {
087              incubator.setTargetHumidity(Double.parseDouble(humidityText));
088            } catch (NumberFormatException ignored) {
089            }
090          }
091
092          IncubatorViewModel viewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity())
093              .get(IncubatorViewModel.class);
094          viewModel.save(incubator);
095        });
096
097    if (editing) {
098      builder.setNeutralButton(R.string.action_deactivate, (dialog, which) -> {
099        Incubator existing = findIncubatorById(incubatorId);
100        if (existing != null) {
101          IncubatorViewModel viewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity())
102              .get(IncubatorViewModel.class);
103          viewModel.deactivate(existing);
104        }
105      });
106    }
107
108    return builder.create();
109  }
110
111  @NonNull
112  private String getText(@NonNull View view) {
113    return ((android.widget.EditText) view).getText().toString().trim();
114  }
115
116  @Nullable
117  private Incubator findIncubatorById(long id) {
118    IncubatorViewModel viewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity())
119        .get(IncubatorViewModel.class);
120    List<Incubator> incubators = viewModel.getActiveIncubators().getValue();
121    if (incubators != null) {
122      for (Incubator incubator : incubators) {
123        if (incubator.getId() == id) {
124          return incubator;
125        }
126      }
127    }
128    return null;
129  }
130
131}
